'''fazata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobupride|dobupride]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobupride|dobupride]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fazata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzætæth|fæzætæth]] || [[word:fæzætæj|fæzætæj]] || [[word:fæzætæsh|fæzætæsh]] || [[word:fæzætæ|fæzætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazazatath|fazazatath]] || [[word:fazazataj|fazazataj]] || [[word:fazazatash|fazazatash]] || [[word:fazazata|fazazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazatath|fazatath]] || [[word:fazataj|fazataj]] || [[word:fazatash|fazatash]] || [[word:fazata|fazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazaftath|fazaftath]] || [[word:fazaftaj|fazaftaj]] || [[word:fazaftash|fazaftash]] || [[word:fazaftaf|fazaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazatatha|fazatatha]] || [[word:fazataja|fazataja]] || [[word:fazatasha|fazatasha]] || [[word:fazataka|fazataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazatath|fazatath]] || [[word:fazataj|fazataj]] || [[word:fazatash|fazatash]] || [[word:fazata|fazata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazatathal|fazatathal]] || [[word:fazatajal|fazatajal]] || [[word:fazatashal|fazatashal]] || [[word:fazatakal|fazatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazatathatha|fazatathatha]] || [[word:fazatajaja|fazatajaja]] || [[word:fazatashasha|fazatashasha]] || [[word:fazataka|fazataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazatathan|fazatathan]] || [[word:fazatajan|fazatajan]] || [[word:fazatashan|fazatashan]] || [[word:fazatakan|fazatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazatathaoro|fazatathaoro]] || [[word:fazatajaoro|fazatajaoro]] || [[word:fazatashaoro|fazatashaoro]] || [[word:fazatakaoro|fazatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
